name: AngleTypes
summary: The different types for angle dimensions.

enum_values.name: AngleOnSide
enum_values.summary: Shows the angle dimensions in degrees on the side.

enum_values.name: AngleAtVertex
enum_values.summary: Shows the angle dimensions in degrees at the angle vertex.

enum_values.name: Triangle
enum_values.summary: Shows the angle dimensions using a triangle. The triangle base length can be configured.

enum_values.name: TriangleWithDegrees
enum_values.summary: Shows the angle using a triangle, also shows the angle in degrees on one side of the triangle.

enum_values.name: AngleOnSideGradian
enum_values.summary: Shows the angle dimensions in gradians on the side.

enum_values.name: AngleAtVertexGradian
enum_values.summary: Shows the angle dimensions in gradians at the angle vertex.

enum_values.name: TriangleWithGradians
enum_values.summary: Shows the angle using a triangle, also shows the angle in gradians on one side of the triangle.
